scenes.description: A man in his early 60s standing on a wooden back porch on a crisp autumn morning, coffee cup held in both hands, gazing out at a yard blanketed in fallen oak and maple leaves. His expression is quiet and thoughtful — the particular weight of a familiar choice, not suffering. Wearing a flannel shirt and casual pants. A gas blower is faintly visible in the dark corner of an open garage to one side. Warm golden morning light raking across the yard.
scenes.mood: Chaleureux, nostalgique, légèrement mélancolique — le calme avant la décision. Tons ambre et ocre de l'automne. Pas de tristesse, juste le poids familier d'une routine qui coûte.

scenes.description: A man in his early-to-mid 60s pushing a large, bulky gas-powered leaf blower across a leaf-covered driveway. His posture tells the story: shoulders slightly rounded, grip firm but effortful, body weight leaning into the machine. Expression neutral and tired — not dramatic, just the recognizable look of someone absorbing a cost they've quietly accepted. Slightly muted, desaturated color grading to contrast with later scenes.
scenes.mood: Réaliste, légèrement désaturé, fatigué sans être dramatique. Ambiance 'avant' — fonctionnel mais coûteux. Lumière plate de milieu de journée.

scenes.description: Two men in their 60s standing on opposite sides of a weathered wooden backyard fence on a sunny autumn afternoon. One holds up a small, compact cordless blower casually — not showing off, just sharing. The other listens with genuine curiosity and mild skepticism, arms loosely crossed. Easy, relaxed body language between neighbors who know each other well. Warm afternoon sun. Leaves scattered across both yards in the background.
scenes.mood: Naturel, détendu, convivial. Le registre de la vraie recommandation entre pairs — pas une pub, une conversation. Lumière chaude de fin d'après-midi.

scenes.description: A man in his early 60s standing upright on a clean flagstone patio, holding the Seese Pro in one hand with his arm relaxed at his side — completely effortlessly. A small arc of leaves is being pushed away in front of him. His posture is fully upright, no tension anywhere in the body. A quiet, satisfied half-smile — not performed happiness, just someone noticing that something is genuinely easier than expected. Warm autumn light, well-kept yard stretching behind him.
scenes.mood: Soulagé, légèrement surpris, satisfait. Lumière dorée douce. Couleurs revenues à la chaleur après la section désaturée. Ambiance 'ça marche vraiment'.

scenes.description: A man in his early 60s standing in the middle of his fully clean, leaf-free backyard on a crisp late-autumn afternoon. He is looking out at his work — the tidy flagstone patio, clean lawn edges, the whole well-kept property. Hands resting easy at his sides or lightly in his pockets. Expression of quiet, unperformed pride — the look of someone who completed exactly what they set out to do, without asking anyone for help. Warm low-angle afternoon light casting long soft shadows.
scenes.mood: Fier, tranquille, autonome. L'image émotionnelle de l'après. Lumière basse et dorée, très cinématographique. Pas de sourire exagéré — juste la dignité d'avoir fait le travail.

scenes.description: The Seese Pro blower and its compact carrying case laid flat on a clean white or light-grain wood surface. Arranged alongside them: the battery pack, the fast charger, and any included accessories — each placed with deliberate spacing, like the contents of a well-organized kit being unpacked. Clean, even lighting with soft shadows. No clutter. The image communicates quality, simplicity, and completeness. The kind of product shot that makes someone want to reach in and pick it up.
scenes.mood: Propre, premium, rassurant. Fond clair neutre. Eclairage de studio doux et uniforme. Le registre de l'objet bien conçu — pas flashy, juste solide et bien fait.

scenes.description: Extreme close-up of the Seese Pro held in a single hand — the hand clearly belonging to someone in their 60s (natural skin texture, not hidden or softened). The grip is completely relaxed, the blower hanging easily at the side as if the person is about to step out the door. Minimal background — a blurred suggestion of a back door or porch railing. Entire focus on the product and the effortless, one-handed hold. Soft natural light from the side.
scenes.mood: Confiant, simple, décisif. L'image finale avant l'achat. Lumière naturelle douce, fond épuré. Le message est dans la main : léger, à portée, prêt.
